name: Pixel Forest Adventure
desc: A 2D platformer with collectible-based progression, score tracking, immersive sound design, and carefully crafted levels that encourage exploration and skillful gameplay.
overview: Pixel Forest Adventure is a Unity-powered 2D platformer featuring collectible-based progression, score-driven challenges, interactive gameplay systems, and immersive pixel-art environments. Designed and developed as a complete PC game, the project highlights practical game development skills including gameplay programming, UI/UX implementation, audio systems, scene management, and player progression mechanics. The result is a polished and engaging experience that demonstrates end-to-end game production capabilities.

name: Tom And Jerry
desc: A high-performance mobile endless runner, blending precision mechanics with an immersive, retro-futuristic atmosphere. Features a rewarding, collectible-based progression loop, real-time score tracking, and immersive spatial audio design that creates a high-stakes, just one more run experience.
overview: Pixel Forest Adventure is a Unity-powered 2D platformer featuring collectible-based progression, score-driven challenges, interactive gameplay systems, and immersive pixel-art environments. Designed and developed as a complete PC game, the project highlights practical game development skills including gameplay programming, UI/UX implementation, audio systems, scene management, and player progression mechanics. The result is a polished and engaging experience that demonstrates end-to-end game production capabilities.
